title: THE END (artificial fragments of humankind)
original_title: The End (fragments artificiels de l'espèce humaine)
overview: Perhaps it is the story of Esther whose life seems to be subject to the amusement of a clicking rabbit, with a mouse on its paw? Or that of Corinne harassed by her libidinous boss? Or that of a young man who dreams daily that he is strangling a woman? What if everything was connected?
